name:
<think>
The user wants me to translate "Pinna" from English to Chinese (zh-CN).

"Pinna" is a name. When translating names, they are typically kept as is or transliterated phonetically. In Chinese, foreign names like "Pinna" would typically be transliterated.

The most common transliteration for "Pinna" in Chinese would be:
- 皮纳 (Pí Nà)
- 皮娜 (Pí Nà)
- 平纳 (Píng Nà)

Without additional context, I'll provide the most common transliteration which would be 皮纳.
</think>

皮纳

description.value: The user wants me to translate the text from English to Chinese (zh-CN). This appears to be a game item description, likely from Dungeons & Dragons or similar RPG system. Let me translate this: "Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage." Key terms to translate: - Melee - 近战 - Ranged - 远程 - Weapon Attack - 武器攻击 - to hit - 命中 - reach - 触及 - range - 射程 - one target - 一个目标 - Hit - 命中 - piercing damage - 穿刺伤害 - ft. (feet) - 尺 Note: In Chinese D&D translations, "尺" (chi) is the standard unit. 1 chi ≈ 1 foot. Let me put it together: 近战或远程武器攻击：+2命中，近战触及5尺或远程射程20/60尺，一个目标。命中：2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。 近战或远程武器攻击：+2命中，近战触及5尺或远程射程20/60尺，一个目标。命中：2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。
